ocr_findings.description: Person name and term systematically misread: image shows 'ジョン・ベン' (John Venn) and 'ベン図' throughout, but OCR renders 'ジョン・ペン' and 'ペン図' everywhere (ベ→ペ substitution). This is a high-severity kana confusion error — ベ and ペ differ only by a diacritic. The term 'ベン図' (Venn diagram) is a key technical term on this page and is wrong in every occurrence.

Set intersection symbol section header: image shows '∩とU' (using proper set notation symbols ∩ and U); OCR renders 'ハとU' — replacing ∩ with katakana ハ. Both section header and table header are affected. This changes the mathematical meaning.
Table cell for A∩B: OCR renders ruby annotation as 'なさしゅうぐう' (nonsensical); image shows 'せきしゅうごう' (積集合, correct reading). Similarly A∪B ruby 'わしゅうぐう' vs correct 'わしゅうごう' — ぐう vs ごう difference.
Table column for ベン図 diagrams shows empty cells in OCR (diagrams are images and not capturable as text). Expected omission.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 09-02 on 集合と論理演算. Two high-severity errors: (1) ベン図→ペン図 (Venn→Pen) substitution throughout all 5+ occurrences, making the key technical term wrong; (2) ∩→ハ substitution in section headers and table, corrupting the set intersection notation. These are meaning-changing errors on a page whose entire topic is Venn diagrams and set operations.
